title: ThinPillars
description: Adds a variant of pillars with a more interesting shape.
body:
Thin Pillars adds decorative pillars using the same model as Astral Sorcery.

 

While it is a stand-alone mod, it can also be used with Quark to unlock additional pillars based on blocks added by that mod.The are automatically added once the relevant modules are enabled.

 

They are crafted either from two polished blocks on top of each other(or the regular pillars in case of Midori, Purpur and Quartz) or in a stonecutter from the regular variant.
